creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
(In reply to p5B2E9A8F from comment #0)
The error message is somehow misleading. As aspell was installed along with weechat as a dependency aspell was not "old/obsolete" as the message suggests.

The file /usr/local/lib/weechat/plugins/aspell.so was a leftover from a previous installation and was not installed by the current installation. 

New installations does not create a file /usr/local/lib/weechat/plugins/aspell.so  
So the question now is, where is the plugin aspell?
And why does weechat depend on aspell if the plugin is not installed?
